funding_note: The CESGA OneHealth DataSpace is a project of the Galicia Supercomputing Center (CESGA), funded by the Spanish Ministry for Digital Transformation and Public Service within the framework of the Recovery, Transformation and Resilience Plan, through the Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF) – "DATAlife Multisectoral Demonstrator. Registration No. TSI-100120-2024-12". Funded by the European Union – NextGenerationEU.
